claims.text: In FY2023, Commercial ASEAN 3 expanded sustainable financing and set interim financed emissions targets toward net zero.
claims.source_sentence: In FY2023, Commercial ASEAN 3 expanded sustainable financing and set interim financed emissions targets toward net zero.

claims.text: In FY2023, Commercial ASEAN 3 strengthened its anti-corruption code of conduct and board ethics oversight.
claims.source_sentence: In FY2023, Commercial ASEAN 3 strengthened its anti-corruption code of conduct and board ethics oversight.

claims.text: In FY2023, Commercial ASEAN 3 invested in cybersecurity controls to prevent customer data breach incidents.
claims.source_sentence: In FY2023, Commercial ASEAN 3 invested in cybersecurity controls to prevent customer data breach incidents.

claims.text: In FY2023, Commercial ASEAN 3 maintained capital adequacy well above regulatory minimums under stress test scenarios.
claims.source_sentence: In FY2023, Commercial ASEAN 3 maintained capital adequacy well above regulatory minimums under stress test scenarios.

claims.text: In FY2023, Commercial ASEAN 3 broadened financial inclusion programmes for underserved SME customers.
claims.source_sentence: In FY2023, Commercial ASEAN 3 broadened financial inclusion programmes for underserved SME customers.

claims.text: In FY2023, Commercial ASEAN 3 increased gender diversity with more women in leadership roles.
